commit.message:
Continue backend architecture cleanup with domain-specific partial classes and backend infrastructure splits (#328)

* Initial plan

* refactor: split Query.cs into partial class files by domain

Extract 3 domain sections from the 4219-line Query.cs into separate
partial class files:

- Query.Rankings.cs: Player/company rankings, company management,
  game state (GetRankings, GetCompanyRankings, GetMyCompanies,
  GetCompanyBrands, GetCompanySettings, GetGameState, GetStarterIndustries)

- Query.Building.cs: Building lots, exchange, inventory, analytics,
  ledger, power grid, first-sale mission, media houses, marketing stats

- Query.Lending.cs: Bank lending marketplace (loan offers, loans,
  procurement preview, sourcing candidates, unit upgrade info)

Query.cs retains auth/admin/news/stock-exchange, world data/encyclopedia,
and result type classes. Query.Chat.cs remains unchanged.

No logic changes — pure file reorganization.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: scholtz <1223439+scholtz@users.noreply.github.com>

* refactor: split Mutation.cs into domain-specific partial class files

Extract building operations, lending, and stock exchange mutations from
the 3455-line Mutation.cs into separate partial class files:

- Mutation.Building.cs (993 lines): StoreBuildingConfiguration,
  CancelBuildingConfiguration, SetBuildingForSale, SetRentPerSqm,
  PurchaseLot, CompleteFirstSaleMilestone, UpdatePublicSalesPrice,
  FlushStorage, ScheduleUnitUpgrade, plus building validation helpers
  and FlushStorageResult/FlushStorageEntry result types.

- Mutation.Lending.cs (397 lines): PublishLoanOffer, UpdateLoanOffer,
  DeactivateLoanOffer, AcceptLoan.

- Mutation.StockExchange.cs (421 lines): BuyShares, SellShares, plus
  share pricing snapshot, trading account resolution, shareholding
  management, and ownership ratio helpers.

- Mutation.cs (1699 lines): Auth, admin, news, company management,
  onboarding, and shared private helpers (GetCurrentTickAsync,
  AddCompanyLedgerEntry, PrepareLotPurchaseAsync, etc.).

All 719 backend tests pass. Pure refactor with no behavioral changes.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: scholtz <1223439+scholtz@users.noreply.github.com>

* Split large backend GraphQL types into domain-specific partial classes

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/scholtz/capitalism/sessions/09210b73-5f6b-481f-b292-d2e6ac95b672

Co-authored-by: scholtz <1223439+scholtz@users.noreply.github.com>

* Continue backend architecture cleanup with partial class and seed-file splits

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/scholtz/capitalism/sessions/9b8eda08-3ad8-4d85-8335-fed872d2ca35

Co-authored-by: scholtz <1223439+scholtz@users.noreply.github.com>

* Split remaining oversized backend infrastructure files

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/scholtz/capitalism/sessions/50f5537f-e050-4119-8f33-976f32bcab33

Co-authored-by: scholtz <1223439+scholtz@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: complete Zapier integration for opendata.best API

- 5 polling triggers: Procurement, Contract Awards, Sanctions, Drug Recalls, NYC Permits
- 4 searches: Sanctions Screening, Company LEI, Healthcare NPI, Federal Contracts
- API Key auth via X-API-Key header with beforeRequest middleware
- Error handling: 401/403 → AuthError, 429 → ThrottledError, 5xx → ServerError
- 52 tests passing (mocked API responses)
- Zapier dedup via item_id → id mapping
- isLoadingSample: 30-day lookback for setup, 2-hour for live polling

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add touch gestures (pan, pinch-zoom, drag) to SVG and Canvas renderers

- Created src/utils/touchGestures.ts: useTouchHandlers hook with native
  touch event listeners ({ passive: false }) for pan, pinch-to-zoom,
  and object drag gestures
- InteractiveSvgCanvas: added cameraRef, hitTest, merged SVG ref callback,
  touch gesture attachment via useEffect
- InteractiveCanvas: added getObjectPos, wired useTouchHandlers, attached
  touch listeners to canvas element
- Both renderers now support: 1-finger pan, 2-finger pinch-zoom + pan,
  1-finger drag objects; WebGL already had OrbitControls

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add admin pages: Social, Settings, Analytics

- admin/social/index.html: Social post generator with 5 templates (Daily Update EN/AR,
  Price Alert, Weekly Summary, Milestone, UAE Arabic), live gold price fetch,
  platform tabs (X/Twitter, Instagram, WhatsApp, LinkedIn), char counters,
  post history (gp_post_history, max 50), custom post section, copy/share actions.

- admin/settings/index.html: Full settings panel backed by gp_settings in localStorage.
  Sections: Commerce (margin %, VAT, WhatsApp number), Site Identity (name, tagline,
  social links), Feature Toggles (CSS pill switches), API Keys (password fields with
  eye toggle), Admin Notes. Sticky save bar with export/import JSON, reset to defaults
  (inline confirm), last-saved timestamp, input validation.

- admin/analytics/index.html: Analytics dashboard reading gp_analytics_events from
  localStorage. Summary stat cards (page views, unique sessions, most viewed page, API
  success rate), 14-day CSS bar chart, top-10 pages table, recent 30 events table with
  event-type color badges, export/clear data management, empty state with onboarding
  explanation.

commit.message:
Fix median overvaluation for single-variant items with declining prices

For items like Pearlescent Dye that have only one meaningful bucket,
the cleanPricePerDay adjustment was disabled (as it is for all clean
items). This meant old references at higher prices were not adjusted
down to reflect declining market conditions.

Now, for clean items with a single non-empty bucket and sufficient
price history (5+ data points), the cleanPricePerDay adjustment is
applied. SelectAdjustedPrice only adjusts downward (when old clean
price > today's clean price), so stable/rising markets are unaffected.

Added test: PearlescentDyeNotOvervalued verifies the bucket price
stays under ~46m instead of inflated ~48m+.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: Karpathy's Knowledge Wiki pattern (#250-255) — 6 features

Implements the persistent, compounding wiki pattern from
gist.github.com/karpathy/442a6bf555914893e9891c11519de94f

WikiEngine (#250):
- .caduceus/wiki/ directory with CRUD, [[link]] parsing
- git-tracked markdown files that persist across sessions

WikiIndex (#251):
- Auto-maintained index.md with categories + summaries
- Orphan page detection, query search

WikiLog (#252):
- Append-only log.md: '## [2026-04-12] ingest | Title'
- Stats aggregation (ingests, queries, lints)

WikiIngestor (#253):
- Extract entities + key claims from raw sources
- Generate summary/entity pages with cross-references
- slugify('My Title') → 'my-title'

WikiLinter (#254):
- Health checks: orphans, broken links, empty, stale pages

WikiQueryEngine (#255):
- TF-relevance scoring, context gathering, citation extraction

Tests: 986 → 1015 (29 new tests)
Total features: 255 (253 ✅ + 2 💡)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
